rulings.Case Title: JUSTET VS UNITED AIRLINES INC
rulings.Calendar Matter: For Attorneys' Fees Against Plaintiff Kenneth Scott Justet; P&A; Decl Of Tracy Thompson
rulings.Rulings: Motion for Fees - DENY, CLAIMS NOT FRIVOLOUS. Motion to Tax - GRANT IN PART. COURT STRIKES: (1) 1/4 OF FILING FEES ($210); (2) $779.67 OF DEPOSITION TRAVEL EXPENSES, See Ladas v. CSAA, (1993) 19 Cal.App.4th 761, 775-776; (3) 1/4 OF DEPOSITION COSTS ($3682.52); (4) 1/4 OF SERVICE OF PROCESS ($413.61); (5) 1/4 OF COURT DELIVERY COSTS ($266.44); (6) 1/4 OF COUNSEL DELIVERY COSTS ($74.75); (7) ALL DUPLICATING COSTS ($9,933.60) BECAUSE INSUFFICIENT SHOWING UNDER CCP 1033.5(a)(12); (8) ALL FAX AND POSTAGE COSTS PER CCP 1033.5(b)(3) ($1,955.90). (PB)

rulings.Case Title: AS YOU SOW VS. CONBRACO INDUSTRIES
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Deft American Granby, Inc.
rulings.Rulings: APPROVE PROVIDED FOLLOWING CHANGES ARE MADE IN REQUESTED JUDGMENT. 1)CHARACTERIZATION OF RESTITUTION TO BE CHANGED TO PAYMENT IN LIEU OF CIVIL PENALTY. IN ADDITION JUDGMENT TO EXPRESSLY PROVIDE THAT PENALTY IS NOT TO BE CREDIT AGAINST ANY FUTURE CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT. 2)LIST OF RECIPIENT OF RESTITUTION PAYMENT IS NOT SATISFACTORY. PAYMENT TO BE MADE TO SPECIFIC ORGANIZATION IN CONFORMITY WITH PROPOSED ATTORNEY GENERAL REGULATION 3203 WITH SUPPORTING PROOF AND ATTORNEY GENERAL APPROVAL. 3)OBJECTIONABLE LANGUAGE AS TO OTHER PARTIES STRICKEN. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: MCKESSON CORPORATION VS. EMMPERATIVE MARKETING, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel Emmperative Marketing Inc. To Retain Legal Representation ; P/A; Declaration ; Pos
rulings.Rulings: GRANT MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT TO RETAIN COUNSEL WITHIN 30 DAYS. IF COUNSEL NOT RETAINED COURT WILL ENTERTAIN A MOTION FOR DEFAULT. (PB)
